entry.title: New: BILL034(26) (Honolulu) — MAYOR
entry.content:
RELATING TO FLOOD HAZARD AREAS.

Amends ROH Chapter 21A to update requirements and construction standards for consistency with the requirements of the FEMA, to remain eligible for participation in the National Flood Insurance Program and the Community Rating System, and make other housekeeping amendments. Takes effect on June 10, 2026.

Latest action: Deadline for Mayor to return Bill is 06/22/26. Transmitted to Mayor for his approval or otherwise.

View on the council site
